'''''Take That!''''' was a [[YT-1210 light freighter/Legends|YT-1210]] Corellian light freighter that was owned and captained by [[Falan Iniro]]. It was destroyed in the [[Battle of Nar Shaddaa (4 BBY)|Battle of Nar Shaddaa]] by the [[Carrack-class light cruiser/Legends|''Carrack''-class light cruiser]] ''[[Renthal's Vigilance]]''.

==Appearances==
*''[[The Hutt Gambit]]''
